✨ Pixi task (build-sollya): bash -c '
  if command -v sollya >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Sollya already installed"; exit 0; fi
  set -e
  SOLLYA_VER=8.0
  cd /tmp
  [ -f sollya-${SOLLYA_VER}.tar.gz ] || curl -L -o sollya-${SOLLYA_VER}.tar.gz https://www.sollya.org/releases/sollya-${SOLLYA_VER}/sollya-${SOLLYA_VER}.tar.gz
  rm -rf sollya-${SOLLYA_VER}
  tar xzf sollya-${SOLLYA_VER}.tar.gz
  cd sollya-${SOLLYA_VER}
  ./configure CC=clang CXX=clang++ CFLAGS="-I$CONDA_PREFIX/include/libxml2" CPPFLAGS="-I$CONDA_PREFIX/include/libxml2" LDFLAGS="-L$CONDA_PREFIX/lib -Wl,-rpath,$CONDA_PREFIX/lib" --prefix=$CONDA_PREFIX --with-gmp=$CONDA_PREFIX --with-mpfr=$CONDA_PREFIX --with-mpfi=$CONDA_PREFIX --with-fplll=$CONDA_PREFIX --with-xml2=$CONDA_PREFIX
  make -j4
  make install
  echo "Sollya ${SOLLYA_VER} installed to $CONDA_PREFIX"
'
Sollya already installed

✨ Pixi task (minimax): sollya < sollya/erfc_minimax.sollya
